<thought>
I see the goal at row 05, column F. The agent is currently facing forward with a wall directly ahead at column D, so moving forward is not possible. To move towards the goal safely, I should turn right to face east, where there is an open cell, and then move forward in subsequent steps.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at position B5, to the left and two rows up. In front of me is a wall blocking direct forward movement. The cell to the left is lava, so I cannot move there safely. However, the cell to my right (D7) is free. I should turn right to move closer to safer ground and possibly approach the goal from a safer route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
